text:
Created attachment 163199
qjail-4.2_port_diff

Correct two lines of code in "qjail config -n" routine logic 

       # Refresh fstab with new directory paths and jailnames.
-      fstab_old_path="${fstab%.*}"
-      fstab="${fstab_old_path}.${new_name}"
+      fstab_old_path="${fstab%/*}"
+      fstab="${fstab_old_path}/${new_name}"
